channel.title: Welcome on Bailey’s Cybersecurity Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome on Bailey’s Cybersecurity Portfolio

item.title: Certificates
item.description:
🧠 TryHackMe Certifications

  • Junior Penetration Tester
    • 📜 Certificate ID: THM-HMNV4HURI7
    • 📅 Issued: July 15, 2025
    • 🕒 Duration: 30 hours 40 minutes
    • 🧩 Skills: Enumeration, Exploitation, Privilege Escalation, Scanning
    • 🔗 View Certificate (optional link)
    • 🖼️

More certifications will be added here as I earn them.

item.title: RootMe Writeup
item.description:
🧠 Introduction

RootMe is a TryHackMe boot-to-root box focused on web exploitation and Linux privilege escalation. It’s great for beginners learning the importance of enumeration and simple web-based attack vectors.

🔍 Reconnaissance

We start with an Nmap scan on the box’s IP :

nmap -sC -sV -Pn -p- 10.10.196.151 > nmap.txt

Port 22 - OpenSSH

Port 80 - Apache Web Server

The classic web exploit into ssh credentials combo :)

item.title: About Me
item.description:
Hi, I’m Bailey — an aspiring penetration tester and red teamer.

Currently studying for CompTIA Security+ and working through TryHackMe’s learning paths and challenges.

This portfolio will document my journey, skills, and writeups.
